notes: toonV3 is canonical TOON v3 output with no extensions enabled.
toonExt enables the currently shipped nestedTabularHeaders, keyedMapCollapse, primitiveArrayColumns, and objectArrayColumns options.
honestyZeroDelta cases must keep toonV3 and toonExt byte-identical when ineligible for all shipped extensions.
specTokens records the Spec #93 Further Notes o200k_base baselines where available; token counting is local-only and not part of CI.

cases.name: shipments-500
cases.description: Flat shipment records; Spec further note baseline includes the tab-delimiter quick win.

cases.name: accounts-300
cases.description: Uniform nested account records; exercises the shipped nested-tabular extension.

cases.name: registry-200
cases.description: Uniform keyed service registry; exercises the shipped keyed-map extension.

cases.name: services-250
cases.description: Uniform nested service records; a second nested-tabular corpus with operational strings.

cases.name: tagged-300
cases.description: Primitive-array column benchmark; opt-in primitive-array columns should beat minified JSON.

cases.name: matrix-150x8
cases.description: Fixed-width primitive matrix benchmark emitted through object-array columns.

cases.name: tree3-100
cases.description: Three-level record tree benchmark for recursive child tables.

cases.name: honesty-non-uniform-rows
cases.description: Nested-tabular fallback control; recursive shape mismatch must stay canonical.

cases.name: honesty-non-uniform-map
cases.description: Keyed-map fallback control; non-uniform values must stay canonical.
